pi_items.source: Task description specifies team name; confirmed as valid Odoo 17 CRM sales team name
Odoo 17 documentation confirms email aliases are supported on crm.team model via mail.alias mixin; verifier.py line 57-58 confirms lowercase comparison of alias_name field

Odoo mail.alias model alias_contact field definition confirms 'everyone' as valid selection option (other options: 'partners', 'followers'). Web search confirmed this is the most permissive email policy for sales team aliases.

Web search of Odoo 12.0+ documentation confirms 'Mitchell Admin' is the default administrative user in Odoo versions 12.0 and later, including Odoo 17. Forum discussion explicitly references 'Mitchell Admin' as the demo user in Odoo 16+ and 17.

privileged_info_summary: This task involves configuring an email alias for a Odoo 17 CRM sales team named 'Direct Sales' with the email alias 'direct-sales' set to accept emails from everyone (the 'everyone' policy), and assigning the team leader to 'Mitchell Admin' (the default admin user in Odoo 17). The crm.team model in Odoo 17 inherits from mail.alias.mixin, providing alias_name and alias_contact fields. The alias_contact field supports three values: 'everyone' (most permissive), 'partners' (authenticated partners only), and 'followers' (followers only). The task uses the XML-RPC API to verify team creation with specific field values.
